evals.name: creates-worktree-with-gitignore-check
evals.prompt: Create a worktree for the feature/auth-refactor branch in this project.
evals.expected_output: Agent checks for existing worktree directory, verifies it's gitignored, creates the worktree, and runs project setup

assertions.text: Creates worktree with git worktree add
Includes branch name in worktree path

evals.name: adds-gitignore-when-missing
evals.prompt: Create a worktree for feature/payments. The .worktrees directory doesn't exist yet and isn't in .gitignore.
evals.expected_output: Agent creates the directory, adds it to .gitignore, commits the gitignore change, then creates the worktree

assertions.text: Commits the gitignore change before creating worktree
Creates the worktree after gitignore is committed

evals.name: auto-detects-project-setup
evals.prompt: Create a worktree for feature/api-v2. After creating it, set up the project dependencies.
evals.expected_output: Agent detects the project type from manifest files and runs the appropriate install command

evals.name: runs-baseline-tests
evals.prompt: Create a worktree for feature/cache-layer and verify it has a clean test baseline.
evals.expected_output: Agent creates worktree, installs deps, runs tests, and reports the result

evals.name: follows-directory-priority
evals.prompt: Create a worktree for feature/search. I think there might already be a worktrees directory somewhere in the project.
evals.expected_output: Agent checks for existing .worktrees/ then worktrees/ before creating new, and checks CLAUDE.md for preferences
